(Check console for details)'); // Reset form setCheckInDate(''); setCheckOutDate(''); setAdults(1); setChildren(0); setRoomType(''); setFullName(''); setEmail(''); setPhone(''); }; const roomTypes = [ { value: '', label: 'Select Room Type' }, { value: 'standard', label: 'Standard Suite' }, { value: 'deluxe', label: 'Deluxe Suite' }, { value: 'premium', label: 'Premium Villa' }, { value: 'presidential', label: 'Presidential Penthouse' }, ]; return (
